ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator leading the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "clinical_trial_id" TEXT /* ID of the associated clinical trial, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES principal_investigators ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the participant is enrolled in */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group the participant belongs to (e.g., healthy, diseased) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the participant */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the participant in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the participant in kilograms */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the participant */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the participant */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption status of the participant */,
  "diet_type" TEXT /* Type of diet */,
  "exercise_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of exercise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome the gene is located on */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "function" TEXT /* Function of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "gene_family" TEXT /* Family of the gene */,
  "gene_ontology_id" TEXT /* Gene Ontology ID */,
  "pathways" TEXT /* Pathways the gene is involved in */,
  "diseases_associated" TEXT /* Diseases associated with the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene expression record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "expression_level" REAL /* Expression level of the gene */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the expression level was measured */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition under which the expression was measured */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment given to the participant */,
  "environmental_factors" TEXT /* Environmental factors affecting the expression */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene cluster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene cluster */,
  "associated_diseases" TEXT /* Diseases associated with the gene cluster */,
  "regulatory_elements" TEXT /* Regulatory elements involved in the gene cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_cluster_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping record */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_cluster_mapping_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_cluster_mapping_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES gene_clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "principal_investigators" (
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principal investigator */,
  "investigator_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the principal investigator */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the principal investigator is affiliated with */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the principal investigator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the principal investigator */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the principal investigator */,
  "publications" TEXT /* List of publications by the principal investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "collaborator_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaborator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the collaborator */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the collaborator is affiliated with */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator in the project */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the collaborator */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the collaborator */,
  "publications" TEXT /* List of publications by the collaborator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES collaborators ("collaborator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene expression record */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Sample ID used in the experiment */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform used for measurement (e.g., microarray, RNA-seq) */,
  "qc_status" TEXT /* Quality control status of the data */,
  "experiment_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the experiment */,
  "batch_id" TEXT /* Batch ID of the experiment */,
  "kit_used" TEXT /* Kit used for the experiment */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol followed for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_metadata_expression_id FOREIGN KEY ("expression_id") REFERENCES gene_expression ("expression_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "change_value" REAL /* Change in expression level */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was observed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change (e.g., treatment, environmental factor) */,
  "previous_expression_level" REAL /* Expression level before the change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments regarding the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_changes_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_changes_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
